title: Budget Analysts
description: Examine budget estimates for completeness, accuracy, and conformance with procedures and regulations. Analyze budgeting and accounting reports.

tasks.text: Analyze monthly department budgeting and accounting reports to maintain expenditure controls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide advice and technical assistance with cost analysis, fiscal allocation, and budget preparation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review operating budgets to analyze trends affecting budget needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compile and analyze accounting records and other data to determine the financial resources required to implement a program.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Examine budget estimates for completeness, accuracy, and conformance with procedures and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Summarize budgets and submit recommendations for the approval or disapproval of funds requests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with managers to ensure that budget adjustments are made in accordance with program changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the preparation of regular and special budget reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret budget directives and establish policies for carrying out directives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform cost-benefit analyses to compare operating programs, review financial requests, or explore alternative financing methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Match appropriations for specific programs with appropriations for broader programs, including items for emergency funds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seek new ways to improve efficiency and increase profits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Testify before examining and fund-granting authorities, clarifying and promoting the proposed budgets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
